ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plant belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the plant */,
  "maternal_plant" INTEGER /* Maternal plant ID */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Family ID */,
  "seeds" INTEGER /* Number of seeds */,
  "plant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant type */,
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil composition */,
  "light_id" INTEGER /* ID of the light exposure */,
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature conditions */,
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humidity conditions */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_maternal_plant FOREIGN KEY ("maternal_plant") REFERENCES maternal_plants ("maternal_plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_plant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_type_id") REFERENCES plant_types ("plant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_light_id FOREIGN KEY ("light_id") REFERENCES light_exposures ("light_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_soil_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_id") REFERENCES soil_compositions ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_humidity_id FOREIGN KEY ("humidity_id") REFERENCES humidity_levels ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_temperature_id FOREIGN KEY ("temperature_id") REFERENCES temperatures ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the plant */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the plant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the plant */,
  "leaf_count" INTEGER /* Number of leaves on the plant */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Length of the plant's roots */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture level of the soil */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the plant */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_measurements_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "germinations" (
  "germination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each germination event */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant that germinated */,
  "date_planted" TEXT /* Date the plant was planted */,
  "germination_time" TEXT /* Date the plant germinated */,
  "time_to_germination" INTEGER /* Time to germination */,
  "is_germinated" INTEGER /* Whether the plant germinated */,
  "germination_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed conditions during germination */,
  "germination_stage" TEXT /* Stage of germination */,
  "germination_photos" TEXT /* URLs to photos of the germination process */,
  "germination_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations during germination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("germination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_germinations_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the factor affects */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the environmental factor was measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor at the time of measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the environmental factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, lab technician) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data input) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternal_plants" (
  "maternal_plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maternal plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the maternal plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the maternal plant */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or source of the maternal plant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the maternal plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maternal_plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the family */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the family */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "plant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "plant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plant type */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant type */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_compositions" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil composition */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Soil composition (e.g., clay, loam, sand) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the soil composition */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "organic_matter" REAL /* Percentage of organic matter in the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "light_exposures" (
  "light_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each light exposure */,
  "light_type" TEXT /* Type of light exposure (e.g., natural, artificial) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of light exposure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the light exposure type */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the light exposure (e.g., lux) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("light_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature measurement */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Value of the temperature measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the temperature measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the temperature conditions */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the temperature was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_levels" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity level measurement */,
  "humidity_value" REAL /* Value of the humidity level measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the humidity level measurement (e.g., percentage, grams/m³) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the humidity conditions */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the humidity level was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)
